purpose: Douyin pure-comic carousel captions placed in the upper safe zone.
rules: Read Chinese captions from UTF-8 script.json and caption-layout.json.
Never pass Chinese caption literals through shell commands.
caption-layout.json may control line breaks, but joined lines must exactly equal script.json text.
Do not place essential text in the bottom 22% Douyin UI zone.
Use this style for handwritten-story comics when readability is more important than decorative calligraphy.
